context: User asks whether source episodic memories are deleted after consolidation is applied

checklist.name: States episodics are NOT deleted
checklist.description: Clearly states that episodic memories are NOT deleted after consolidation

checklist.name: States episodics are marked superseded
checklist.description: Explains that source episodic memories are marked as 'superseded' (not removed)

checklist.name: States approved proposals become semantic memories
checklist.description: Explains that approved proposals are written as new semantic-tier memories

checklist.name: Mentions human-edited immunity
checklist.description: Mentions that manually edited memories are never overwritten by consolidation

checklist.name: Accurate and no contradictions
checklist.description: The explanation contains no factually incorrect statements about what consolidation does
